heading: Requirement for authorization of number of family housing units
label: 2822 Requirement for authorization of number of family housing units
notes: Amendments2003—Subsec. (b)(6). added par. (6).Pub. L. 108–1361992—Subsec. (b)(5). added par. (5).Pub. L. 102–4841991—Subsec. (b)(4). realigned margin of par. (4).Pub. L. 102–251990—Subsec. (b)(4). amended par. (4) generally. Prior to amendment, par. (4) read as follows: “Housing units acquired without consideration, if—Pub. L. 101–510“(A) the Secretary concerned provides to the appropriate committees of Congress written notification of the facts concerning the proposed acquisition; and“(B) a period of 21 days elapses after the notification is received by those committees.”1987—Subsec. (b)(4). added par. (4).Pub. L. 100–1801984—Subsec. (b)(3). substituted “section 2832” for “section 2833”.Pub. L. 98–525

children.label: a
children.text: Except as otherwise provided in subsection (b) or as otherwise authorized by law, the Secretary concerned may not construct or acquire military family housing units unless the number of units to be constructed or acquired has been specifically authorized by law.
Housing units acquired under section 404 of the Housing Amendments of 1955 ().42 U.S.C. 1594a
Housing units leased under .section 2828 of this title
Housing units acquired under the Homeowners Assistance Program referred to in .section 2832 of this title
Replacement housing units constructed under .section 2825(c) of this title
Housing units constructed or provided under .section 2869 of this title
